parameters.jsCode:
const records = $input.first().json.data || [];
return records.map(record => ({ json: record }));

nodes.name: Generate Tender Eligibility and Bid Checklist

options.systemMessage:
=You are a tender analysis assistant.
Read the tender data and produce:
eligibility_summary,
ai_summary,
match_score,
checklist_items.
Checklist items must be practical bid preparation tasks.
Return clean JSON only.

nodes.name: Combine Tender Source and AI Analysis
Create Tender Master Row in Google Sheets
Create Tender Master Record in Supabase
Create Checklist Rows in Google Sheets

assignments.name: message

parameters.content:
## Scheduled Intake

This section starts the workflow on a timed schedule and loads tender records into a structured format. It prepares the incoming data so every tender has a consistent shape before duplicate checking and analysis begin.

## Data Storage
This section combines the source tender data with the AI output, stores the final tender record, expands checklist items into separate rows, and saves each checklist task. It creates a complete tender history and bid action list in both storage systems.

## Duplicate Control

This section merges the results from both duplicate lookups and sends forward only those records that are truly new. It acts as the main gatekeeper of the workflow, keeping the downstream AI and storage steps clean and accurate.

## AI Analysis
This section prepares the tender text for the AI model, generates an eligibility summary and checklist, then converts the returned JSON into usable structured fields. It turns raw tender details into practical bid preparation guidance.

## Record Enrichment
This section builds the duplicate key, assigns default status values, and checks existing tender records in both storage systems. It helps prevent duplicate entries and ensures only fresh tenders move to the next stage of the workflow.

## Team Alerts
This section builds a clear alert message and sends it to the team through Slack and Gmail. It makes sure the tender opportunity is visible immediately, so the bid team can review, prioritize, and begin preparation without delay.

## How it works
This workflow runs on a schedule, loads tender records, normalizes them, and builds a duplicate key for each tender. It checks Google Sheets and Supabase to avoid repeated records, then sends only new tenders to AI for eligibility summary and bid checklist generation. After that, it stores the tender and checklist data, then sends Slack and email alerts for quick action.

## Setup Steps
1. Trigger the workflow with the schedule node.
2. Load the tender records from the source dataset.
3. Normalize tender fields and build the duplicate key.
4. Check Google Sheets and Supabase for duplicates.
5. Filter only new tender records.
6. Send the tender details to AI for summary and checklist generation.
7. Save the tender and checklist rows, then send Slack and email alerts.
